model.description: ID of the model to use for OCR processing.

pages.description: Specific page numbers to process. If not provided, all pages are processed.

include_image_base64.description: Whether to include base64-encoded images of extracted figures and charts in the response.

image_limit.description: Maximum number of images to extract and return.

image_min_size.description: Minimum size in pixels for images to be included in the response.
